title: Disco Ball Motor Light with Remote: Rechargeable Battery Operated Rotating Hanging Mirror Ball Motor with Adjustable Speed - 18RGBW LED Light Up 4 6 8 12 inch Party Disco Balls Rotator
features: 4000 mAh Large Battery Mirror Ball Motor: Built-in 4000 mAh large-capacity rechargeable battery, can be used for more than 24 hours when fully charged; Also equipped with USB power cord, plug and play; 2 power supply modes to meet your different indoor and outdoor needs

Disco Ball Motor with Remote: You can easily control the hanging disco ball light with the remote control, freely adjust the 3 rotation speeds (5RPM, 10RPM, 15RPM) and 4 working modes of the disco ball spinner, convenient and flexible

Rotating Disco Ball Motor with 4-color Lights: The disco ball rotator is equipped with 18 high-brightness F5LED lamp beads, which can emit bright red, green, blue and white lights; in voice-controlled mode, the lights can also flash with the changes in ambient sound

Compatible with Mirror Balls of Various Sizes: This Heavy duty large disco ball motor is compatible with 4-12 inch mirror balls, perfect for a variety of party scenes, the maximum load capacity is 4.4 pounds, which ensures the stable and smooth rotation of the hanging mirror ball, creating a dazzling light effect

Easy to Install and Use: The rotating mirror ball motor is equipped with a hook on the top, you can hang it on the ceiling and anywhere you want, with the mirror ball (Not included), it can create dazzling lighting effects and a romantic atmosphere, perfect for bars, dance parties, weddings, birthdays, KTV, disco parties, 70s and 80s theme parties
description: Product Description Specifications Package includes: 1x disco ball motor, 1x remote control, 1x USB cable, 1x power adapter, 1x instruction manual (disco ball not included) Size: 5.7" x 5.7" x 3.3" Net weight: 0.66 lbs (0.3 kg) Support: 4/6/8/10" disco balls Maximum load capacity: about 4.4 lbs (about 2 kg) Long Battery Life Equipped with a 4000mAh battery, it provides hours of continuous lighting, ensuring non-stop party excitement Vibrant LED Lights Features 18 high-brightness LED lights, creating a dazzling disco vibe for any event Innovative Hook The unique 3-in-1 S-shaped hook ensures secure and flexible installation, perfect for parties, camping, and more USB Charging Designed with a USB charging port, it supports various power sources, keeping the disco fun going anytime, anywhere Disco Ball and Light Disco Ball Motor Buying Options Disco Ball Motor Add To Basket Pinspot Light with Remote Buying Options 8 Inch Silver Disco Ball Add To Basket 8 Inch Gold Disco Ball Buying Options 8 Inch Pink Disco Ball Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 3 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.3 out of 5 stars 7 4.4 out of 5 stars 220 4.4 out of 5 stars 220 4.4 out of 5 stars 220 Price £39.98 £ 39 . 98 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 — £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £24.69 £ 24 . 69 £25.99 £ 25 . 99 With remote control ✔ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ Power source 4000 mAh rechargeable battery Battery-powered Wired Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable Light RGBW RGBW RGBW Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable Size Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable 8 Inch 8 Inch 8 Inch Color Black Black Black Silver Gold Pink
